claims.statement: detectMimeType returns "application/octet-stream" when Files.probeContentType(sourceFile) is null.
detectMimeType returns "application/octet-stream" when mimeType.isBlank() is true.
detectMimeType returns mimeType when mimeType is neither null nor blank.

entities.name: detectMimeType
entities.description: Function that detects a file MIME type.

entities.name: isBlank
entities.description: Method used to test whether a string is blank.

entities.name: probeContentType
entities.description: Files.probeContentType call used to detect MIME type.

relations.description: detectMimeType calls isBlank when validating the detected MIME type.
detectMimeType calls probeContentType to inspect the source file.
